task_description: Extract structured data from the following text and return valid JSON with the specified fields.
input_data: Invoice #2024-0512 dated March 15, 2024. Bill to: John Smith, 123 Main St, New York, NY 10001. Items: Widget A ($29.99 x 2 = $59.98), Widget B ($15.50 x 3 = $46.50). Subtotal: $106.48. Tax (8%): $8.52. Total: $114.99. Payment method: Credit Card ending in 4242.

task_description: Parse the following product description into structured JSON format.
input_data: Product: UltraBook Pro Laptop. Model: UB-2024-X1. Processor: Intel Core i7-13700K. RAM: 16GB DDR5. Storage: 512GB NVMe SSD. Display: 15.6 inch 4K OLED. Battery: 8 hours. Price: $1,899.99. Color: Space Gray. In stock: Yes. Rating: 4.8/5 stars.

task_description: Extract event details from the announcement and format as JSON.
input_data: TechConf 2024 Annual Conference. Dates: June 10-12, 2024. Location: San Francisco Convention Center, 747 Market Street, CA 94103. Keynote Speaker: Dr. Sarah Chen. Registrations start on March 1st at $299 (early bird) rising to $399 after May 1st. Expected attendance: 5,000+ participants. Contact: events@techconf.org.
expected_output: {"event_name": "TechConf 2024 Annual Conference", "start_date": "2024-06-10", "location": "San Francisco Convention Center", "keynote_speaker": "Dr. Sarah Chen", "registration_fee": 299, "contact_email": "events@techconf.org"}

task_description: Extract job posting information into structured JSON format.
input_data: Senior Software Engineer position at TechCorp Inc. Location: San Francisco, CA (Hybrid). Salary range: $150,000 - $200,000 annually. Requirements: 5+ years experience, Python and Java expertise, BS in Computer Science or equivalent. Benefits: Health insurance, 401k matching, unlimited PTO. Application deadline: April 30, 2024. Contact: careers@techcorp.com. Job ID: ENG-2024-451.

task_description: Convert the meeting notes into structured JSON data.
